title: Sociology Master Program Mission and Vision
content:
Sociology Master Program Mission and Vision

Mission

To give a comprehensive and in-depth sociology education that would allow our students to observe, understand and explain the structure and the relational aspects of social realities, along with the sociological imagination focused to investigate the Zeitgeist.

Vision

Within the context of this given mission, our vision is to educate and cultivate researchers and scholars who would do academic research building perspectives with a high level of sociological imagination and transform those studies into social projects and to scientifically contribute to the production of social and cultural policies aimed towards the detection and solution of social problems.
